official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_default_spawn_position default fixture
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_default_spawn_position to packet id 0x61.
The scoped fixture body is LevelData.RespawnData.DEFAULT: overworld ResourceKey, zero BlockPos, yaw 0.0, and pitch 0.0.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, respawn fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer respawn behavior, compass state, world state, player state, or non-default dimension handling.
